{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304105733D86F9369E55994E3BA"}"},"total":7963},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7075226248578155294","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"想了想，于是在这里留个评
为数不多看了很喜欢，甚至觉得很有意思的无限流小说。无论是机制，人物性格刻画，副本本身的故事都令人深思。
前期没有男主，看着文章很舒适。希望后期有恋爱线也不要无脑恋爱，上纲上线，兢兢业业谈情说爱推剧情，一定会变得很好看。
作者大大辛苦了，非常感谢能有机会读这么好看的小说。很期待后续发展，希望小队成员都好好活着，得偿所愿。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1647329486,"group_id":"7052168593143761950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0G7Z3OlDo/Bh+ENdrNSwQkiQ0v86Qv/31j4kss10Br","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72dfe8c6b3c548b29cd9dcff107c5752~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796467&x-signature=Um5ae%2B%2FNh0aX4mYi%2BP%2FkBAA1q3I%3D","user_id":"3958691313755696","user_name":"南华府的罗兹玛丽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3958691313755696","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7052168593143761950","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+惊悚悬疑解密+女强+团队+剧情向】

":0,"author_digg_time":1646446778,"author_reply_time":1646446792,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7092093712788620068","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，看过很多无限流小说，这一本无论是女主人设还是副本节奏，副本故事还有配角的塑造都很好，女主不是那种一个人厉害到碾压所有人的，队伍里每个人都有自己的长处，每个小人物都塑造得很立体，就拿覃文他们两兄弟来说，是n号配角，但是有血有肉有自己的故事，每一个副本也有值得思考的地方，揭示着一个社会现实，真的很不错！还好当时没看到“连载中”这几个字！不然只看完结文的我就错过了！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1651256771,"group_id":"7052168593143761950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N//w8RjXVw7NsMSA26vCBogkBdmtKu5mkqTN6bXyez9I","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3698385350036116","user_name":"月月又饿了-"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3698385350036116","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7052168593143761950","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+惊悚悬疑解密+女强+团队+剧情向】
